violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (empanadas) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Proper glove use reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
The 3-bay sanitizer dispenser in the deli area was observed with a leak. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the produce 3-bay is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Various foods were observed held at 42-44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food was relocated at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the deli display cases. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

The online grocery pick up reach-ins were not in good repair. Reach-ins and food located inside were observed with an elevated temperature. All food was relocated, refrigeration technician was called. Units must not be used until repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
Two ceiling tiles near the bakery in the retail area were observed leaking. PIC placed service order at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was observed with a cardboard box on top of it. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023

The following were observed in poor repair: 1) The sanitizing dispenser in the produce warewashing area 2) The stoppers for the 3-bay sink in the produce and bakery area] Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor in the walk-in freezer has an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
